title: Publish the website

requirements.text: Publish and deploy the AI Healthcare Monitoring application so it is publicly accessible.
acceptanceCriteria: The application is deployed and accessible via a public URL.
All existing features (Risk Predictor, X-Ray Analysis, Dashboard, History) are fully functional on the deployed version.
The backend canister is live and responds to frontend queries correctly.

constraints: Do not alter any existing functionality or data models.
Do not modify immutable frontend paths (hooks, main.tsx, ui components).
nonGoals: Changing the visual design or layout.
Modifying backend logic or health record schema.
